debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
inst✝⁷ : DecidableEq α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty α
A : ℕ → Ω → α
R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁴ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝³ : IsMarkovKernel ν
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω
inst✝¹ : Nonempty Ω
inst✝ : Countable α
h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P
a b : α
hab : a ≠ b
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount A R a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount A R b s ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

failed_attempts:
let φ (seq : ℕ → ℝ) (s : ℕ) : ℝ := s.casesOn 0 (fun n ↦ seq n)
  have hφ : Measurable φ := measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun s ↦ s.casesOn measurable_const (fun n ↦ measurable_pi_apply n)
  have h_pi := iIndepFun.pi ((iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).reindex (Equiv.sigmaProd α ℕ).symm)
  convert (h_pi.indepFun_comp hab).comp hφ hφ
  · ext ω s; cases s <;> simp [rewardByCount_zero]
  · ext ω s; cases s <;> simp [rewardByCount_zero]

let f c ω n := rewardByCount A R c (n + 1) ω
  have : IndepFun (f a) (f b) 𝔓' :=
    (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_comp (fun n ↦ (a, n)) (fun n ↦ (b, n))
      (Set.disjoint_left.mpr (by simp [hab]))
  let G (seq : ℕ → ℝ) s := if s = 0 then 0 else seq (s - 1)
  have hG : Measurable G := measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun s ↦ by cases s <;> simp <;> fun_prop)
  have heq c : (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R c s ω) = G ∘ f c := by
    ext ω s; cases s <;> simp [rewardByCount_zero]
  rw [heq a, heq b]
  exact this.comp hG hG

refine iIndepFun.indepFun_pi (hf := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h) (S := {a} ×ˢ Set.univ) (T := {b} ×ˢ Set.univ) ?_
  exact Set.disjoint_left.2 (fun x hx hx' ↦ hab (hx.1.symm.trans hx'.1))
exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_pi_disjoint (Set.disjoint_left.mpr (by simp [hab]))

let g : (ℕ → ℝ) → (ℕ → ℝ) := fun f s ↦ if s = 0 then 0 else f (s - 1)
  refine IndepFun.comp (g := g) (h := g) ?_ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_comp (fun n ↦ (a, n)) (fun n ↦ (b, n))
    (by simp [Set.disjoint_left, hab])

let X (p : α × ℕ) ω := rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω
  have hX : iIndepFun X 𝔓' := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  let f (c : α) ω := fun p : {p // p.1 = c} ↦ X p ω
  have hf : iIndepFun f 𝔓' := hX.indepFun_comp Function.surjective_fst
  refine (hf.indepFun hab).comp ?_ ?_
  · exact measurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun n ↦ measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a n)
  · exact measurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun n ↦ measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R b n)

refine IndepFun.comp (iIndepFun.indepFun_pi_p_set (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h)
    (Set.disjoint_left.2 (by simp [hab]))) ?_ ?_
  · exact measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a
  · exact measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R b
(iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_comp Prod.fst hab

have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω)
      (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
    have h_i := (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_pi_app (s := Set.range (a, ·))
      (t := Set.range (b, ·)) (by simp [Set.range_subset_iff, hab])
    exact h_i.comp (measurable_pi_lambda _ fun n ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(a, n), Set.mem_range_self n⟩)
      (measurable_pi_lambda _ fun n ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(b, n), Set.mem_range_self n⟩)
  let Φ (f : ℕ → ℝ) (s : ℕ) : ℝ := if s = 0 then 0 else f (s - 1)
  have hΦ : Measurable Φ := measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun s ↦ by
    by_cases hs : s = 0 <;> simp [hs]; exact measurable_pi_apply (s - 1))
  refine IndepFun.ae_eq (ae_eq_pi.mpr fun s ↦ ?_) (ae_eq_pi.mpr fun s ↦ ?_) (h_indep.comp hΦ hΦ)
  · by_cases hs : s = 0 <;> simp [hs, rewardByCount_zero, Φ]; omega
  · by_cases hs : s = 0 <;> simp [hs, rewardByCount_zero, Φ]; omega

refine iIndepFun.indepFun_sigma (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h)
    (Set.disjoint_left.mpr fun x hx hy ↦ hab (hx.1.symm.trans hy.1)) ?_ ?_
  · exact Measurable.comap_le (measurable_pi_lambda fun n ↦
      measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a n)
  · exact Measurable.comap_le (measurable_pi_lambda fun n ↦
      measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R b n)
exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).comp Prod.fst |>.indepFun_at_ne hab

let S : Set (α × ℕ) := Set.range (fun n ↦ (a, n))
  let T : Set (α × ℕ) := Set.range (fun n ↦ (b, n))
  have hST : Disjoint S T := Set.disjoint_left.mpr (by rintro p ⟨n, rfl⟩ ⟨m, hm⟩; simp at hm; exact hab hm.1)
  have h_indep := (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_pi_combine hST
  have h_eq (c : α) (U : Set (α × ℕ)) (hU : ∀ n, (c, n) ∈ U) :
      (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R c s ω) =
      (fun (f : U → ℝ) s ↦ match s with | 0 => 0 | n + 1 => f ⟨(c, n), hU n⟩) ∘
      (fun ω (p : U) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω) := by
    ext ω s; cases s <;> rfl
  rw [h_eq a S (fun n ↦ Set.mem_range_self n), h_eq b T (fun n ↦ Set.mem_range_self n)]
  refine h_indep.comp (measurable_pi_lambda fun s ↦ ?_) (measurable_pi_lambda fun s ↦ ?_)
  · cases s <;> [exact measurable_const, exact measurable_pi_apply _]
  · cases s <;> [exact measurable_const, exact measurable_pi_apply _]

let f := fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1)
  have : iIndepFun f 𝔓' := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  have h_disjoint : Disjoint (Set.range (fun n ↦ (a, n))) (Set.range (fun n ↦ (b, n))) := by
    simp [Set.disjoint_left]; rintro _ n rfl m h; exact hab h.1
  exact (this.indepFun_pi_disjoint h_disjoint).comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_comp (fun n ↦ (a, n)) (fun n ↦ (b, n))
    (Set.disjoint_range_pair_left hab)

let g (c : α) (f : {p : α × ℕ | p.1 = c} → ℝ) (n : ℕ) : ℝ :=
    if h0 : n = 0 then 0 else f ⟨(c, n - 1), by simp [h0]⟩
  have hg (c : α) : Measurable (g c) :=
    measurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun n ↦ by dsimp [g]; split_ifs <;> fun_prop)
  have h_indep := (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_pi_combine
    (Set.disjoint_iff_forall_mem.mpr (fun _ hx1 hx2 ↦ hab (hx1.symm.trans hx2)))
  convert h_indep.comp (hg a) (hg b)
  · ext ω n; dsimp [g]; split_ifs with h0; · rw [h0, rewardByCount_zero]; · rfl
  · ext ω n; dsimp [g]; split_ifs with h0; · rw [h0, rewardByCount_zero]; · rfl
sorry

let g (x : ℕ → ℝ) (n : ℕ) : ℝ := if n = 0 then 0 else x (n - 1)
  have hg : Measurable g := measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun n ↦ by split_ifs <;> fun_prop)
  have h_rw (c : α) : (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R c s ω) = fun ω ↦ g (fun n ↦ rewardByCount A R c (n + 1) ω) := by
    ext ω s; cases s <;> simp [g, rewardByCount]
  rw [h_rw a, h_rw b]
  refine iIndepFun.indepFun_comp (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h) (Prod.mk a) (Prod.mk b) ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_ g g hg hg
  · simp [hab, disjoint_range_iff_forall]
  · exact fun p ↦ measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R p.1 (p.2 + 1)
  · exact fun _ _ h' ↦ by injection h'
  · exact fun _ _ h' ↦ by injection h'

let f arm ω n := rewardByCount A R arm (n + 1) ω
  have h_f : IndepFun (f a) (f b) 𝔓' :=
    (iIndepFun_iff_iIndepFun_pi_combine 𝔓').mp (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h) |>.indepFun hab
  let φ : (ℕ → ℝ) → (ℕ → ℝ) := fun g n ↦ n.cases 0 g
  have h_eq arm : (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R arm s ω) = φ ∘ f arm := by
    ext ω s; cases s <;> simp [φ, f, rewardByCount_zero]
  rw [h_eq a, h_eq b]
  exact h_f.comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_comp (fun p ↦ p.1) hab

let f (c : α) (ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ)) (n : ℕ) := rewardByCount A R c (n + 1) ω
  have hf : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ f p.1 p.2) 𝔓' := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  let g (seq : ℕ → ℝ) (n : ℕ) : ℝ := if n = 0 then 0 else seq (n - 1)
  have hg : Measurable g := measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun n ↦ by
    by_cases hn : n = 0 <;> simp [hn, measurable_const, measurable_pi_apply])
  have h_eq (c : α) : (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R c s ω) = (fun ω ↦ g (f c ω)) := by
    ext ω s; cases s <;> simp [f, g, rewardByCount]
  rw [h_eq a, h_eq b]
  exact (hf.indepFun_precomp (by simp [Set.range_prod_singleton, hab])).comp hg hg

let X c ω n := rewardByCount A R c (n + 1) ω
  have h_indep : IndepFun (X a) (X b) 𝔓' :=
    (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).reindex (Equiv.sigmaEquivProd α ℕ).symm |>.indepFun_pi_index hab
  have h_eq c : (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R c s ω) = (fun ω ↦ (fun s ↦ if s = 0 then 0 else X c ω (s - 1))) := by
    ext ω s; cases s <;> simp [X, rewardByCount]
  rw [h_eq a, h_eq b]
  exact h_indep.comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

let X c ω n := rewardByCount A R c (n + 1) ω
  let G (f : ℕ → ℝ) n := if n = 0 then 0 else f (n - 1)
  have hG : Measurable G := measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun n ↦ by split_ifs <;> fun_prop
  have h_eq c : (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R c n ω) = G ∘ X c := by
    ext ω n; cases n; · simp [G, rewardByCount]; · rfl
  rw [h_eq a, h_eq b]
  exact (iIndepFun.indepFun_pi ((iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).reindex
    (Equiv.sigmaEquivProd α ℕ).symm) hab).comp hG hG
sorry
exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_pi_disjoint (Set.disjoint_prod.mpr (Or.inl (Set.disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hab)))

exact iIndepFun.indepFun_comp (fun _ _ h ↦ by simp at h; exact h) (fun _ _ h ↦ by simp at h; exact h)
    (by simp [hab, Set.disjoint_left]) (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h)
exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_pi_combine hab

let H (g : ℕ → ℝ) (s : ℕ) := if s = 0 then 0 else g (s - 1)
  have hH : Measurable H := measurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun s ↦ by cases s <;> simp [H]; exact measurable_pi_apply _)
  have hf (c : α) : (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R c s ω) = (fun ω ↦ H (fun n ↦ rewardByCount A R c (n + 1) ω)) := by
    ext ω s; cases s <;> rfl
  rw [hf a, hf b]
  refine ((iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_comp (Set.disjoint_left.mpr ?_)).comp hH hH
  rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩ ⟨m, h_eq⟩
  simp only [Prod.mk.inj_iff] at h_eq
  exact hab h_eq.1
sorry
exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_pi_combine (disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hab)
exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_precompose Prod.fst hab

exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).indepFun_out (show Disjoint {p | p.1 = a} {p | p.1 = b} by
    simp [Set.disjoint_iff_forall_mem, hab])
